entries.source: Check each step, correct errors, and connect procedures to concepts.
entries.value: Egiaztatu urrats bakoitza, zuzendu erroreak eta lotu prozedurak kontzeptuekin.

entries.source: Check one step before the whole answer
entries.value: Egiaztatu urrats bat erantzun osoaren aurretik

entries.source: Check the reasoning line by line
Check this step in my working. If it is wrong, explain the mistake and give me one next move.
entries.value: Egiaztatu urrats hau nire lanean. Oker badago, azaldu akatsa eta eman hurrengo mugimendu bat.

entries.source: Check what fields my citation is missing
entries.value: Egiaztatu nire aipuari zer eremu falta zaizkion

entries.source: Checking understanding, getting unstuck, and building confidence through active practice.
entries.value: Ulermena egiaztatzea, trabatik ateratzea eta praktika aktiboaren bidez konfiantza eraikitzea.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: ikasleak ideia berriro azal dezakeen egiaztatzea.

entries.source: Checks that keep the learning honest

Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: 13 urtetik beherako haurrei aplikazioa erabiltzea gomendatzen zaie, baina heldu baten gainbegirapean. Hala ere, ez dugu jakinaren gainean 13 urtetik beherako haurren Informazio Pertsonalik biltzen edo prozesatzen, eta berariaz debekatzen diogu 13 urtetik beherako edozein erabiltzaileri gurasoen baimenik gabe informazio pertsonala ematea. 13 urtetik beherako haur baten gurasoa bazara eta zure haurrak Informazio Pertsonala eman digula uste baduzu, beharrezko ekintzak hartuko ditugu eta, beharrezkoa bada, jakinaraziko dizugu. Ez dago beharrezko ekintzarako epe finkorik, kudeatzen ditugun kontsulten bolumenaren eta eskuragarri dugun langileriaren araberakoa baita.

entries.source: Choose a public AI learning mode and start as a guest learner.
entries.value: Aukeratu AI ikaskuntza-modu publiko bat eta hasi gonbidatu-ikasle gisa.

entries.source: Choose a workflow that connects articles, prompts, and public learning modes.
entries.value: Aukeratu artikuluak, promptak eta ikaskuntza-modu publikoak lotzen dituen lan-fluxu bat.

entries.source: Choose a workflow that connects guides, prompts, and live learning modes.
entries.value: Aukeratu gidak, promptak eta ikaskuntza-modu biziak lotzen dituen lan-fluxu bat.

entries.source: Choose fair metrics, anti-gaming rules, and reset cadence.
entries.value: Aukeratu metrika bidezkoak, jokoaren aurkako arauak eta berrezartze-kadentzia.

entries.source: Choose generated focus audio for reading, writing, problem solving, or deep work. It keeps playing while you switch to other chats.
entries.value: Aukeratu irakurketarako, idazketarako, problemak ebazteko edo lan sakonerako sortutako foku-audioa. Beste txat batzuetara aldatzean ere jotzen jarraitzen du.

entries.source: Choose the language for this visit.
Choose the learning job before choosing the words.
Choose the right learning tool for the moment.
Choose who is learning, then choose the right behavior.
entries.value: Aukeratu nor ari den ikasten, gero aukeratu jokabide egokia.

entries.source: Choosing the right public guest learning mode for the task at hand.
entries.value: Esku artean dagoen zereginerako gonbidatuentzako ikaskuntza-modu publiko egokia aukeratzea.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: ikasi konstituzioak, demokrazia, hauteskundeak, auzitegiak, eskubideak, betebeharrak eta politika publikoa.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Civics Coach prompts and study loop
Clarify country/context if needed, then explain the institution or idea simply.
entries.value: Argitu herrialdea/testuingurua behar bada, gero azaldu erakundea edo ideia modu errazean.

entries.source: Clarify goal, deadline, resources, and done criteria.
entries.value: Argitu helburua, epea, baliabideak eta amaituta dagoela jakiteko irizpideak.

entries.source: Clarify role, goal, stakes, and tone; then begin in character.
entries.value: Argitu rola, helburua, jokoan dagoena eta tonua; gero hasi pertsonaian.

entries.source: Clarify the personality, topic, and learner's side before beginning.
entries.value: Argitu nortasuna, gaia eta ikaslearen aldea hasi aurretik.

entries.source: Clarify the question and identify variables or the core concept.
entries.value: Argitu galdera eta identifikatu aldagaiak edo kontzeptu nagusia.

entries.source: Clarify the question and offer two or three angles.
entries.value: Argitu galdera eta eskaini bi edo hiru ikuspegi.

entries.source: Clarify the question, add evidence, summarize replies, and plan follow-up.
entries.value: Argitu galdera, gehitu frogak, laburbildu erantzunak eta planifikatu jarraipena.

entries.source: Clear answers for learners, schools, and search systems.
entries.value: Erantzun argiak ikasleentzat, eskolentzat eta bilaketa-sistementzat.

entries.source: Clear boundaries for a public AI learning platform.
entries.value: AI ikaskuntza-plataforma publiko baterako muga argiak.

entries.source: Close with a recap or review plan you can use later.
entries.value: Itxi gero erabil dezakezun laburpen edo berrikuspen-plan batekin.

entries.source: Cluster, tag, summarize, connect, and turn notes into review prompts.
entries.value: Taldekatu, etiketatu, laburbildu, lotu eta bihurtu oharrak berrikuspen-promptetan.

entries.source: Coach homework ethically by supporting the learner's process.
entries.value: Coachatu etxeko lanak etikoki, ikaslearen prozesua babestuz.

entries.source: Coach interview preparation through practice and feedback.
entries.value: Coachatu elkarrizketa-prestaketa praktikaren eta feedbackaren bidez.

entries.source: Coach learners through project planning and execution.
entries.value: Coachatu ikasleak proiektuen plangintzan eta gauzatzean.

entries.source: Coach the learner without shaming them. Ask for context when needed. Be clear about uncertainty. Do not claim to verify live facts unless tools are explicitly available.
entries.value: Coachatu ikaslea lotsarazi gabe. Eskatu testuingurua behar denean. Izan argi ziurgabetasunari buruz. Ez esan zuzeneko datuak egiaztatzen dituzula tresnak berariaz eskuragarri ez badaude.

entries.source: Coach visual thinking through diagrams, sketches, maps, and labels.
entries.value: Coachatu pentsamendu bisuala diagramen, zirriborroen, mapen eta etiketen bidez.

entries.source: Coach writing from idea to revision while preserving the learner's voice.
entries.value: Coachatu idazketa ideiatik berrikuspenera, ikaslearen ahotsa mantenduz.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building

Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Eraikiz programazioa ikasteko Code Tutor AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: ulertu kodea, araztu erroreak, ikasi kontzeptuak eta eraiki proiektu txikiak pausoz pauso.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: practical guide
entries.value: Eraikiz programazioa ikasteko Code Tutor: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Code Tutor prompts and study loop
Coding help should leave you able to predict, test, and explain the code instead of pasting mystery snippets.
entries.value: Programazio-laguntzak kodea aurreikusteko, probatzeko eta azaltzeko gai utzi behar zaitu, misteriozko zatiak itsatsi beharrean.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: ireki lan-espazio partekatu bat AI lankide batekin. Sortu zirriborro zakar bat, trukatu edizioak, jarri erronka puntu ahulei, erregistratu erabakiak eta amaitu aurrerapen zehatzarekin.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction prompts and study loop
Common traps that make AI learning weaker.
entries.value: AI ikaskuntza ahultzen duten ohiko tranpak.

entries.source: Community page connected to DeepHack recognition.
Compare ethical lenses, test edge cases, and ask the learner to justify a position.
entries.value: Konparatu lente etikoak, probatu ertzeko kasuak eta eskatu ikasleari jarrera bat justifikatzeko.

entries.source: Compare every guest mode and pick the format that fits the learning job.
entries.value: Konparatu gonbidatu-modu guztiak eta aukeratu ikaskuntza-lanari egokitzen zaion formatua.

entries.source: Compare every public guest mode and choose the right format for the next step.
entries.value: Konparatu gonbidatu-modu publiko guztiak eta aukeratu hurrengo urratserako formatu egokia.

entries.source: Compare inspir with other learning tools and choose when to use live AI tutoring, public guest modes, prompts, guides, and study workflows.
entries.value: Konparatu inspir beste ikaskuntza-tresnekin eta aukeratu noiz erabili AI tutoretza bizia, gonbidatu-modu publikoak, promptak, gidak eta ikasketa-lan-fluxuak.

entries.source: Compare options, show day-in-life, identify skills, and suggest experiments.
entries.value: Konparatu aukerak, erakutsi eguneroko bizitza, identifikatu trebetasunak eta proposatu esperimentuak.

entries.source: Compare reasoning, identify the exact misconception, then give a similar practice item.
entries.value: Konparatu arrazoiketa, identifikatu uste oker zehatza, eta gero eman antzeko praktika-elementu bat.

entries.source: Compute scenarios, explain assumptions, and identify the highest leverage next assessment.
entries.value: Kalkulatu agertokiak, azaldu suposizioak eta identifikatu hurrengo ebaluaziorik eragin handienekoa.

entries.source: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: mapatu ideiak nola erlazionatzen diren, kausetatik eta ondorioetatik kategorietara, adibideetara eta kontraesanetara.

entries.source: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Concept Map Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Concept Map Builder promptak eta ikasketa-zikloa

entries.source: Condense readings into useful study notes
Connect physical geography to human activity, ask map-thinking questions, and compare regions.
entries.value: Lotu geografia fisikoa giza jarduerarekin, egin mapa-pentsamenduko galderak eta konparatu eskualdeak.

entries.source: Connecting events, ideas, institutions, places, values, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Gertaerak, ideiak, erakundeak, lekuak, balioak eta trukeak lotzea.

entries.source: Contributions are welcome from engineers, educators, designers, students, and anyone who wants AI learning to be safer, clearer, more accessible, and more useful.
entries.value: Ekarpenak ongi etorriak dira ingeniariengandik, hezitzaileengandik, diseinatzaileengandik, ikasleengandik eta AI bidezko ikaskuntza seguruagoa, argiagoa, eskuragarriagoa eta erabilgarriagoa izatea nahi duen edonorengandik.

entries.source: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.
entries.value: Bihurtu datuak, zerrendak, hitzaldiak edo sekuentziak buru-eszena gogoangarrietan.

entries.source: Convert facts, speeches, lists, or sequences into memorable scenes that make recall easier during study and exams.
entries.value: Bihurtu datuak, hitzaldiak, zerrendak edo sekuentziak ikasketan eta azterketetan gogoratzea errazten duten eszena gogoangarrietan.

entries.source: Convert lectures, readings, or rough notes into the Cornell method with cue questions, core notes, summary, and review prompts.
entries.value: Bihurtu hitzaldiak, irakurketak edo apunte zakarrak Cornell metodoaren arabera, gako-galderekin, oinarrizko apunteekin, laburpenarekin eta berrikusteko proposamenekin.

entries.source: Convert the explanation into active recall cards, then revisit the cards after mistakes or hesitation.
entries.value: Bihurtu azalpena oroitzapen aktiboko txarteletan; gero berrikusi txartelak akatsen edo zalantzaren ondoren.

entries.source: Convert the miss into a card and schedule the next repetition.
entries.value: Bihurtu hutsa txartel batean eta programatu hurrengo errepikapena.

entries.source: Convert the user goal into a rough shared artifact before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes." Ask at most one practical context question if needed, but still create the starter structure.
entries.value: Bihurtu erabiltzailearen helburua zirriborro partekatu zakar batean aholkuak eman aurretik. Hasi honela: "Lehen egitura zakarra egin dut. Editatu nahi duzuna. Zure aldaketei erantzungo diet." Behar bada, egin gehienez testuinguru praktikoari buruzko galdera bat, baina hala ere sortu hasierako egitura.

entries.source: Convert topics or notes into structured revision guides.
entries.value: Bihurtu gaiak edo oharrak berrikuspen-gida egituratuetan.

entries.source: Convert wrong answers and unclear definitions into active recall cards.
entries.value: Bihurtu erantzun okerrak eta definizio ilunak gogoratze aktiboko txarteletan.

entries.source: Copy the structure of strong prompts, then open the matching live mode and adapt it to the topic.
entries.value: Kopiatu prompt sendoen egitura, gero ireki dagokion modu bizia eta egokitu gaiari.

entries.source: Core AI tutoring modes for explanations, Socratic questions, shared work, and adaptive lessons.
entries.value: Azalpenetarako, galdera sokratikoetarako, lan partekaturako eta ikasgai moldagarrietarako AI tutoretzako oinarrizko moduak.

entries.source: Could you handle a starter prompt like "{value1}" with less help than before?
entries.value: Lehen baino laguntza gutxiagorekin kudeatu ahal izango zenuke "{value1}" bezalako hasierako prompt bat?

entries.source: Could you turn the article into one concrete prompt or question?
entries.value: Artikulua prompt edo galdera zehatz batean bihur zenezake?

entries.source: Coverage ideas that link back to real public pages.
entries.value: Benetako orri publikoetara itzultzen diren estaldura-ideiak.

entries.source: Coverage of inspir's vision for free, accessible education.
entries.value: inspir-en ikuspegiaren estaldura: hezkuntza doakoa eta eskuragarria.

entries.source: Create a mind map for brainstorming, revision, planning, or connecting concepts before writing or studying.
entries.value: Sortu buru-mapa bat ideiak sortzeko, errepasatzeko, planifikatzeko edo kontzeptuak lotzeko, idazten edo ikasten hasi aurretik.

entries.source: Create a realistic study plan around your time, energy, goals, weak spots, review loops, and practice schedule.
entries.value: Sortu ikasketa-plan errealista bat zure denboraren, energiaren, helburuen, puntu ahulen, berrikuspen-zikloen eta praktika-egutegiaren inguruan.

entries.source: Create a safer route for practice, explanations, feedback, and revision prompts without sending students into a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Sortu praktikarako, azalpenetarako, feedbackerako eta berrikuspen-promptetarako ibilbide seguruago bat, ikasleak chatbot generiko batera bidali gabe.

entries.source: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Sortu ikasketa-plan bat zure denboraren, energiaren, helburuen eta puntu ahulen inguruan.

entries.source: Create accountability check-ins with clear commitments, proof, recovery rules, and supportive follow-up.
entries.value: Sortu kontu-emateko jarraipen-saioak, konpromiso argiekin, frogekin, berreskuratzeko arauekin eta laguntzazko jarraipenarekin.

entries.source: Create an evidence-aware historical expedition anchored in a temporal passport, concrete place, date, identity, constraints, and progressive world state.
entries.value: Sortu frogez jabetutako espedizio historiko bat, denborazko pasaportean, leku zehatzean, datan, identitatean, mugetan eta mundu-egoera progresiboan ainguratua.

entries.source: Create APA, MLA, Chicago, Harvard, or simple bibliography entries from source details while checking for missing fields.
entries.value: Sortu APA, MLA, Chicago, Harvard edo bibliografia-sarrera sinpleak iturriaren xehetasunetatik abiatuta, falta diren eremuak egiaztatuz.

entries.source: Create badges for consistency, mastery, courage, revision, collaboration, and finished artifacts.
entries.value: Sortu insigniak jarraitasunerako, maisutasunerako, ausardiarako, errepasorako, lankidetzarako eta amaitutako artefaktuetarako.

entries.source: Create challenge rules, rounds, feedback, unlocks, and recap.
entries.value: Sortu erronka-arauak, txandak, feedbacka, desblokeoak eta laburpena.

entries.source: Create concise learning reports that lead to better planning.
entries.value: Sortu plangintza hobea ekartzen duten ikaskuntza-txosten laburrak.

entries.source: Create diagram labeling practice from described visuals.
entries.value: Sortu deskribatutako ikusizkoetatik diagramak etiketatzeko praktika.

entries.source: Create exam-style practice tests that assess more than recall.
entries.value: Sortu gogoratzea baino gehiago ebaluatzen duten azterketa-estiloko praktika-probak.

entries.source: Create fair leaderboards that reward effort, improvement, teamwork, or consistency without discouraging slower learners.
entries.value: Sortu sailkapen-taula bidezkoak, ahalegina, hobekuntza, talde-lana edo jarraitutasuna saritzen dituztenak, erritmo motelagoa duten ikasleak desanimatu gabe.

entries.source: Create fair, engaging 10-question multiple-choice quizzes on learner-chosen topics.
entries.value: Sortu ikasleak aukeratutako gaiei buruzko 10 galderako aukera anitzeko galdetegi bidezko eta erakargarriak.

entries.source: Create matching practice that strengthens associations.
Create one quiz question or flashcard from the mistake.
entries.value: Sortu galdetegi-galdera edo ikasketa-txartel bat akatsetik.

entries.source: Create practical exam preparation plans and review routines.
entries.value: Sortu azterketetarako prestaketa-plan praktikoak eta berrikuspen-errutinak.

entries.source: Create practical language roleplays with feedback.
Create short challenges and boss rounds
Create structured deep work sessions for difficult learning tasks.
entries.value: Sortu lan sakoneko saio egituratuak ikaskuntza-zeregin zailetarako.

entries.source: Create worksheets with question types such as fill-in-the-blank, MCQs, true/false, short answers, and matching.
entries.value: Sortu lan-fitxak honelako galdera motekin: hutsuneak betetzea, aukera anitzeko galderak, egia/gezurra, erantzun laburrak eta parekatzea.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: pentsatu proiektuak, istorioak, diseinuak, izenburuak, esperimentuak eta ustekabeko ikuspegiak.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer prompts and study loop
Curiosity, practice, and AI that teaches.
entries.value: Jakin-mina, praktika eta irakasten duen AIa.

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Edozertaz jakin-mina duzu? Galdetu, esploratu eta sakondu zure erritmoan. Zure lagunak ideiak praktiko, gogoangarri eta haien gainean eraikitzeko erraz bihurtzen ditu. Saiatu: "Azaldu nola funtzionatzen duen benetan burtsak."

entries.source: Curious learners exploring context, arguments, people, texts, and ideas.
entries.value: Testuingurua, argudioak, pertsonak, testuak eta ideiak arakatzen dituzten ikasle jakin-minak.

entries.source: Curious learners exploring history, humanities, argument, and big questions.
entries.value: Historia, humanitateak, argudioa eta galdera handiak arakatzen dituzten ikasle jakin-minak.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel alive without confusing simulation for sources.
entries.value: Historia eta ideiak bizi sentitu nahi dituzten ikasle jakin-minak, simulazioa iturriekin nahastu gabe.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel situated, debatable, and alive without losing track of evidence.
entries.value: Historia eta ideiak kokatuak, eztabaidagarriak eta biziak sentitzea nahi duten ikasle jakin-minak, ebidentziaren haria galdu gabe.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Hasteko leku atsegin bat nahi duten ikasten ari diren pertsona jakin-minak, ikasleak, gurasoak eta autodidakta eraikitzaileak.

entries.source: Custom AI learning spaces for every school community.
Custom AI learning spaces with data confidentiality.
Custom content, prompts, and workflows can be adapted around NCERT needs and school-specific classroom priorities.
entries.value: Eduki, prompt eta lan-fluxu pertsonalizatuak NCERT beharretara eta eskola jakin bateko ikasgelako lehentasunetara egokitu daitezke.

entries.source: Customer Safety & Privacy is our Priority
entries.value: Bezeroen segurtasuna eta pribatutasuna dira gure lehentasuna
